name: AI Meeting Follow-up - 10 Audio Intake API

parameters.content: Optional post-MVP audio intake. Use fake/demo audio only. This workflow transcribes a small audio upload with Gemini, then calls the existing Create Draft API. Replace GEMINI_API_KEY and CREATE_DRAFT_WEBHOOK_URL_PLACEHOLDER after import.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ok: false, status: $json.status || 'audio_rejected_input', error_message: $json.error_message || 'Audio input rejected.' } }];
return [{ json: { ok: false, status: $json.status || 'gemini_transcript_failed', error_message: $json.error_message || 'Transcript validation failed.' } }];

nodes.name: LLM Audio Transcription HTTP - Configure API Key
nodes.notes: Replace GEMINI_API_KEY with an n8n credential or expression before using.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  meeting_title: $json.meeting_title,
  department: $json.department,
  meeting_type: $json.meeting_type,
  audience: $json.audience,
  language_hint: $json.language_hint,
  reviewer_name: $json.reviewer_name,
  notify_channel: $json.notify_channel,
  demo_data_confirmed: true,
  manual_transcript: $json.manual_transcript,
  source_mode: $json.source_mode,
  transcript_language: $json.transcript_language,
  speaker_notes_json: $json.speaker_notes_json,
  quality_notes_json: $json.quality_notes_json
} }}

nodes.name: Call Create Draft Webhook - Configure URL
nodes.notes: Set URL to your production webhook, for example http://localhost:5678/webhook/meeting-followup/create-draft.

main.node: LLM Audio Transcription HTTP - Configure API Key
Call Create Draft Webhook - Configure URL
